titleStmt.title: SII 6.1046: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1046. (A.R. No. 332-XXXVI of 1899). IN THE FORTIETH NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmān gaṁgānvayōsti kṣītipatitilakō bhānutulyapratāpō vīraśrībhānudēvō hariśikharipatēḥ svēna pitrā
rppitasya . śrīgaṁgābhōgasya paṁca pravaraguṇagaṇān nāyakān nityasidhyai rājanyān rājamauḷipratinidhīnakarōtsarvvakāryēṣu
dakṣān . 1 śākābdē sāyakādrigrahapatigaṇitē jīvavārē ca pauṣyāṁ tēṣāṁ tāmēva vṛttinnaraharibhavanēkalpayadvarttasaṁ ca
yā pūrvvēṣāṁ svapūrvvairiva narapatibhirnnāyakānāṁ kṛtābhūddharmmō rakṣaṇīyassakaḷanṛpatibhiḥ śrīnṛsiṁhasya bhaktaiḥ [. 2*] śrī
śakevaruṣaṁbulu 1275 gunēṁṭi puṣya paurnnamayu guruvāramunāṁḍu śrīvīrabhānudēvarāju tanaku niṣṭārttha
siddhigā tama taṁḍri vīranarasiṁhadēvuṁḍunnu gaṁgāmahādēvinnai śrīnarasiṁhanāthunikiṁ beṭina gaṁgānarasiṁha bhōgamu
tānaku telikaṭṭugoni Aidu nāyakolu pūrvvana rājulu peṭṭina prakāranē peṭenu Ī nāyakola prasādamu tirupati vai
ṣṇavulunnu sthānāpatulunnu pūrvvamaṁdula nāyakola prakārānanē peṭikonaṁgalāru Ī nāyakola jītālaku tāṁ
ḍraṁgini jalakṣētramu muppaṁdumu veṭenu Ī bhōgāna karaṇikāna prasada kuṁcālu 10 mudrakuṁcālu 7 . nnuThe inscription stops
Digital edition of SII 6.1046 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
